overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walkthrough of a futuristic nightclub. The player enters through a corridor, moves through a pink neon-lit bar lounge, and enters a large dance floor with a stage and dense crowd.

events.description: passing through glass entry doors from the corridor into the club interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance corridor and passing the bouncer into the nightclub

notable_agents.action: muscular bouncer with white hair standing guard near the entrance door

entered.detail: large industrial metal door frame with glass panels
green and red neon tube lights along the corridor ceiling
glass doors with metal frames leading into the club

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow entrance corridor with industrial metal walls and neon lighting. The player approaches and passes through glass doors into the club, passing a bouncer standing guard.

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar lounge area, passing by patrons seated on benches and the bar counter

entered.detail: continuous pink neon light strips running along the floor edges
long dark bar counter with pink neon underlighting
large digital screen displaying a white stylized mask logo on red background
upholstered bench seating along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a bar lounge illuminated by vibrant pink neon floor strips. Patrons sit on benches along the walls, and a large digital screen displays a logo at the far end. The bar counter runs along the right side with pink underlighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor leading to main dance floor

events.description: approaching glass doors with bright yellow stage light visible from the dance floor beyond

agents.ego_description: moving through the darker corridor toward the main dance floor area

entered.detail: purple-lit vending machine with yellow warning symbols
glass doors leading to the brightly lit main dance floor

segments.scene_description: The player transitions through a darker corridor with a vending machine visible on the left. The lighting shifts dramatically as bright yellow light becomes visible through glass doors ahead, indicating the entrance to the main dance floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dance floor with stage and DJ booth

events.description: entering the large main dance floor with stage, bright yellow lighting, and dense crowd
moving through dense crowd of dancing people near the stage area

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded dance floor toward the stage, navigating between dancing NPCs and observing the environment

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear dancing and taking photos with her phone
group of people dancing and socializing on the upper balcony level

entered.detail: elevated stage with DJ equipment and large speakers
bright yellow illuminated panels and spotlights above the stage
second level balcony with railings overlooking the dance floor

segments.scene_description: The player enters a large open dance floor filled with a dense crowd dancing to the music. A stage with DJ booth dominates the far end, bathed in bright yellow light and atmospheric fog. An upper balcony level overlooks the scene from the right, with people dancing both on the floor and above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile industrial entrance into the vibrant, high-energy heart of a futuristic nightclub. It begins in a narrow corridor with metal walls and neon accents, moving past a bouncer and through glass doors into a lounge bathed in vivid pink neon floor strips and underlighting. As the camera passes patrons on benches and a large digital logo, the scene shifts into a darker transitional hallway featuring a vending machine before bright yellow light begins to bleed through the doors ahead. The environment then opens dramatically into a massive dance floor filled with a dense crowd and atmospheric fog, finally revealing a DJ booth on a brightly lit stage and an overlooking balcony crowded with dancers.
